mapper.sql: t0.id, t0.tenant_id, t0.creator, t0.create_stamp, t0.last_editor, t0.last_edit_stamp, t0.type, t0.cooperate_bank, t0.cooperate_bank_branch, t0.industry_type, t0.product_name, t0.big_small, t0.gover_type, t0.debt_begin_date, t0.debt_end_date, t0.loan_money, t0.pact_code, t0.loan_code, t0.guarantee_rate, t0.risk_compensation, t0.aid, t0.aname, t0.acode, t0.bid, t0.bcode, t0.bname, t0.loan_pact_code, t0.relation_enterprise, t0.relation_enterprise_no, t0.pled_pact_code
